user_prompt: Draft a response to a customer asking why their feature request from 6 months ago is still open.
actual_output:
Priority: Medium  
Category: Feature Request / Product Feedback  
Suggested action: Check the existing feature request status, add customer impact to the product team’s notes, and avoid promising a delivery date unless confirmed.

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

Thanks for reaching out, and I completely understand why it’s frustrating to see your feature request still open after 6 months. I’m sorry we haven’t provided more clarity along the way.

Feature requests can stay open for a while when our product team is still evaluating demand, technical complexity, and how the request fits into the broader roadmap. That said, your feedback is still valuable, and an open status means it hasn’t been dismissed.

I’ve added a note to the request with your follow-up and will make sure the team has the latest context on why this matters to you. If you’re able to share how this impacts your workflow or any workaround you’re currently using, I can include that as well — it helps the product team prioritize more accurately.

I don’t want to promise a timeline before we have one confirmed, but we’ll keep the request linked to your account so we can notify you if there’s an update.

Thanks again for your patience, and I’m happy to help look for an alternative approach in the meantime.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot fully complied with the user's request by providing a categorized triage summary and a well-drafted, empathetic response that follows the system's behavioral guidelines.
